'''hagungu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:okama|okama]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-g-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:okama|okama]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| hagungu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || hægingith || hægingij || hægingish || hægingi
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || hagugunguth || hagugunguj || hagugungush || hagugungu
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || hagunguth || hagunguj || hagungush || hagungu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || hagufngufth || hagufngufj || hagufngufsh || hagufnguf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || hagunguthu || hagunguju || hagungushu || hagunguku
|-
| [[Patient]] || hagunguth || hagunguj || hagungush || hagungu
|-
| [[Possessive]] || hagunguthul || hagungujul || hagungushul || hagungukul
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || hagunguuthuthu || hagunguujuju || hagunguushushu || hagunguuku
|-
| [[Dative]] || hagunguthun || hagungujun || hagungushun || hagungukun
|-
| [[Speaker]] || hagunguthuoro || hagungujuoro || hagungushuoro || hagungukuoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
